title: [3.14] gh-143191: Use _PyOS_MIN_STACK_SIZE in _thread.stack_size() (GH-143601)
author: miss-islington
body:
The stack size must be at least _PyOS_MIN_STACK_SIZE+SYSTEM_PAGE_SIZE
bytes.
(cherry picked from commit ba10100c3931b18812b82d7124e2238f01927910)

Co-authored-by: Victor Stinner <vstinner@python.org>

<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-143191 -->
* Issue: gh-143191
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->
